title: Buttermilk Brine
description: Tangy, spiced buttermilk brine that tenderizes and seasons meat from the inside out. This is the move if you want juicy, flavorful chicken every time.
instructions: Combine buttermilk, kosher salt, black pepper, smoked paprika, Tabasco, and celery seeds in a large container.
Add your protein (typically chicken) and make sure it is fully submerged.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 4 hours, up to 24 hours for deeper flavor.
Remove from brine and let excess drip off before cooking.
notes: Do not rinse after brining, just let the excess drip off.
Works best with chicken pieces, especially for frying or roasting.
You can add garlic, hot sauce, or herbs to customize the flavor.
whyThisHits: This is the cheat code for juicy chicken. The buttermilk breaks things down just enough while the seasoning builds flavor all the way through.
pairing: Perfect prep for fried chicken, grilled chicken, or roasted pieces. Pair the final dish with coleslaw, biscuits, or something crisp to balance it out.
footerLine: Art for Your Mouth. Because boring food is a waste of time.
